caption: police officers are seen at the scene of a shooting in the 600 block of west side avenue in detroit on monday, march 20, 2019
alert_text:
Alert: A potential security incident has been reported at the Building A entrance, with possible abnormal activity or an intruder, and immediate attention is required to ensure campus safety.

Recommended action:
• Move away from the area immediately if you are in the vicinity of Building A entrance to ensure your own safety.
• Call Campus Security at extension 5555 or use the emergency button to report the incident, providing clear information about the location and description of the incident.
• If safe to do so, attempt to verbally de-escalate the situation while waiting for security personnel to arrive, but do not attempt to physically intervene unless you are trained security personnel.
